about.page_title: About — Pulser · The team that builds it
about.meta_desc: Pulser is building the AI operating system for modern fitness. Founded by a GTM-first sales veteran and a 30-year AI and knowledge-management specialist.
about.fitness_software_is_broken_were_re: Fitness software is broken. We're rebuilding it.
about.pulser_is_the_operating_system_for: Pulser is the operating system for that problem. One platform for operators. One AI coach for members. A unified data layer that lets the two finally speak.
about.discovery_calls_lois_and_paid_pilo: Discovery calls, LOIs and paid pilots before we ship features. Pull, not push.
about.peerreviewed_biomechanics_validati: Peer-reviewed biomechanics validation, EHDS compliance, Horizon Europe alignment. Slower, harder, defensible.
about.the_gym_only_wins_if_the_member_wi: The gym only wins if the member wins. Every feature has to prove both sides benefit.
about.were_not_hiring_yet_were_building_: We're not hiring yet — we're building and validating with the first operators, coaches and members. If that sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you.
about.managed_b2b_saas_partnerships_acro: • Managed B2B SaaS partnerships across EU markets
about.30_years_in_knowledge_management_t: • 30+ years in knowledge management, TRIZ, AI
about.9_years_at_epam_systems_llmbased_t: • 9 years at EPAM Systems — LLM-based tools
about.founded_zorka_lab_seka_ai_ontology: • Founded Zorka Lab + SEKA AI (ontology-based AI)
ai_coach.page_title: AI Coach — Pulser · The defensible moat
ai_coach.meta_desc: Real-time form analysis via smartphone camera. Wearable integration. Preventive health monitoring. EHDS-compliant and peer-reviewed.
ai_coach.a_coach_that_sees_every_rep_and: A coach that sees every rep. And every warning sign.
ai_coach.a_proprietary_movement_interpre: A proprietary movement interpretation layer, not a wrapper.
ai_coach.from_rep_quality_to_retention_p: From rep quality to retention prediction.
ai_coach.the_feature_your_competitors_ca: The feature your competitors can't retrofit.
ai_coach.most_ai_fitness_apps_are_a_thin: Most "AI fitness" apps are a thin UI on top of someone else's API. The AI Coach inside Pulser.One is built on our own proprietary movement interpretation layer — pose estimation, biomechanical modelling, injury-risk scoring, periodisation. It runs on-device wherever it can, in the cloud where it needs to scale.
ai_coach.that_means_three_things_privacy: That means three things: privacy-first by design, a moat that compounds with every session trained on the platform, and features a SaaS CRM cannot retrofit in a sprint.
ai_coach.not_openai_not_a_thirdparty_api: Not OpenAI. Not a third-party API. Movement, risk and plan generation run on our own stack.
ai_coach.pose_estimation_and_form_scorin: Pose estimation and form scoring run locally on your phone. Low latency, high privacy.
ai_coach.injuryrisk_and_programming_mode: Injury-risk and programming models trace back to published biomechanics research.
ai_coach.every_session_across_pulserone_: Every session across Pulser.One, Pulser.Gym and Pulser.Coach sharpens the model.
ai_coach.mediapipebased_pose_estimation_: MediaPipe-based pose estimation runs on the member's smartphone. Frame-by-frame form feedback on squat, deadlift, bench — no special hardware required.
ai_coach.apple_watch_garmin_whoop_oura_f: Apple Watch, Garmin, Whoop, Oura feed continuous cardiovascular and recovery signals. The coach knows when to push and when to pull back.
ai_coach.members_can_share_injuries_chro: Members can share injuries, chronic conditions, medications. Plans are tailored around real medical context — with full user control and EHDS compliance.
ai_coach.point_your_phone_the_coach_scor: Point your phone. The coach scores depth, bar path, hip drive, knee tracking. Haptic or audio cues tell you what to fix — before you load another plate.
ai_coach.weekly_programming_that_adapts_: Weekly programming that adapts to what actually happened: missed sessions, poor recovery, tough life days. Not a static PDF.
ai_coach.combined_signals_flag_elevated_: Combined signals flag elevated injury risk, signs of overtraining, cardiovascular anomalies. Members are nudged — gyms get context.
ai_coach.for_gym_operators_a_daily_list_: For gym operators: a daily list of members at churn risk, ranked — with the reason why and the suggested intervention.
ai_coach.cto_andrei_kuryan_publishes_at_: CTO Andrei Kuryan publishes at Springer (AI-Powered Innovation, 2025). We publish biomechanics validation studies so gyms can sell members on clinically proven AI.
ai_coach.eu_health_data_space_regulation: EU Health Data Space regulation (2025/327) goes live in phases from 2026. Pulser is architected EHDS-ready from day one — not retrofitted.
ai_coach.members_choose_what_to_share_wi: Members choose what to share, with whom, for how long. Data portability and right-to-erasure baked into the product, not bolted on.
ai_coach.published_validation_unlocks_ho: Published validation unlocks Horizon Europe and EHDS grants — non-dilutive funding only science-led platforms can access.
ai_coach.the_ai_coach_ships_with_every_c: The AI Coach ships with every copy of Pulser.One (free forever on the base tier, deeper features on Pro and Enterprise) and streams straight into Pulser.Gym and Pulser.Coach. A DeepTech moat built on our own IP.
contact.page_title: Contact — Pulser · Book a demo, request the data room
contact.meta_desc: Three ways to reach us: gym owners book a 20-minute demo, investors request the data room, members tell us where they train.
contact.members_tell_us_where_you_train_:
Members

Tell us where you train — we'll reach out to your gym.
contact.direct_email_works_too_gopulserf: Direct email works too: go@pulser.fit
contact.thanks_message_received_well_rep: Thanks — message received. We'll reply within 24h.
contact.name: Name
for_coaches.meta_desc: Pulser.Coach is the cockpit for personal trainers and coaches — clients, programming, billing and live feedback on one platform, connected to every gym and member on Pulser.
for_coaches.youre_a_coach_not_a_spreadsh: You're a coach, not a spreadsheet wrangler.
for_coaches.one_cockpit_for_everyone_you: One cockpit for everyone you train.
for_coaches.built_on_the_same_movement_e: Built on the same movement engine your clients already trust.
for_coaches.programming_comms_payments_s: Programming, comms, payments, scheduling, video, client notes — none of them talk to each other.
for_coaches.chasing_clients_rebuilding_p: Chasing clients, rebuilding plans, updating spreadsheets — time that never makes it onto an invoice.
for_coaches.you_prescribe_a_plan_the_cli: You prescribe a plan. The client trains. You have no idea what actually happened until the next session.
for_coaches.every_client_every_plan_ever: Every client, every plan, every payment status — one list, one tap. Across every gym they visit.
for_coaches.draganddrop_plan_builder_wit: Drag-and-drop plan builder with your templates, exercise library and periodisation — delivered straight into their Pulser.One app.
for_coaches.when_a_client_trains_you_see: When a client trains, you see real sets, reps, tempo and form score — powered by the proprietary movement engine inside Pulser.One.
for_coaches.automated_nudges_video_revie: Automated nudges, video reviews and recovery pings, with the AI surfacing who actually needs your attention this week.
for_coaches.onlineoffline_sessions_packs: Online/offline sessions, packs, subscriptions, cancellations — invoices sent automatically. No more chasing.
for_coaches.connect_to_gyms_on_the_pulse: Connect to gyms on the Pulser network. Your members can train at partner gyms; the gyms can offer you to their members.
for_coaches.pulsercoach_plugs_directly_i: Pulser.Coach plugs directly into Pulser.One (the member app) and Pulser.Gym (the gym OS). Whatever your client does in a session — at home, at the gym, on the road — flows into your cockpit in real time.
for_coaches.no_manual_logging_no_can_you: No manual logging. No "can you send me a video?" No more flying blind between sessions.
for_coaches.pulsercoach_is_entering_earl: Pulser.Coach is entering early access. Join the waitlist and get priority onboarding plus a seat at the coach advisory board.
for_gyms.page_title: For Gyms — Pulser · Cut churn, replace your stack, add AI
for_gyms.meta_desc: The gym operating system that replaces Mindbody, Glofox, a member app and your e-commerce — and adds an AI coach that cuts churn by 12pp.
for_gyms.software_your_members_actually_: Software your members actually stay for.
for_gyms.youre_paying_200800month_for_so: You're paying €200–800/month for software that can't talk to itself.
for_gyms.one_platform_everything_your_gy: One platform. Everything your gym runs on.
for_gyms.200_members_12pp_less_churn_172: 200 members. 12pp less churn. €17–20K/year back in your pocket.
for_gyms.see_it_run_on_your_gym_in_20_mi: See it run on your gym in 20 minutes.
for_gyms.not_a_saas_with_an_ai_sticker_a: Not a SaaS with an AI sticker. A platform with its own movement engine.
for_gyms.your_members_train_anywhere_you: Your members train anywhere. You get new traffic in return.
for_gyms.booking_in_one_app_payments_in_: Booking in one app. Payments in another. Member app is white-labelled junk. Nothing shares data. No one sees the full member.
for_gyms.your_software_schedules_classes: Your software schedules classes — it doesn't tell you that Anna hasn't shown up in 11 days and is 7 days from cancelling.
for_gyms.75_of_members_say_theyd_stay_if: 75% of members say they'd stay if their gym offered personalised plans. You can't offer what your software can't do.
for_gyms.contact_attendance_payment_enga: Contact, attendance, payment, engagement and health data — unified per member.
for_gyms.group_1on1_and_pt_bookings_with: Group, 1-on-1 and PT bookings with waitlists, coach rosters and auto-reminders.
for_gyms.subscriptions_dropins_packages_: Subscriptions, drop-ins, packages, failed-payment recovery — EU-ready.
for_gyms.fully_whitelabel_ios_amp_androi: Fully white-label iOS & Android app — members see your brand, not ours.
for_gyms.launch_a_branded_public_website: Launch a branded public website from a template in minutes — no web agency, everything pre-wired.
for_gyms.builtin_storefront_for_membersh: Built-in storefront for memberships, drop-ins, supplements, merch. +€3–6K/year typical uplift at a 200-member gym.
for_gyms.realtime_form_feedback_via_the_: Real-time form feedback via the member's smartphone camera. Preventive health alerts from wearables.
for_gyms.pulsergym_ships_with_the_same_p: Pulser.Gym ships with the same proprietary movement interpretation layer that powers every member on Pulser.One — body scan, form scoring, injury-risk and personalised programming. Your gym becomes a place where science shows up in every session.
for_gyms.any_pulserone_member_can_check_: Any Pulser.One member can check in at any partner gym within their tier grade — built into the platform, not a third-party network. Automated settlement, reciprocal revenue-share, no front-desk workarounds. Travelling members stay loyal; travelling members from other gyms become your walk-ins.
for_gyms.incumbents_manage_operations_pu: Incumbents manage operations. Pulser manages outcomes.
for_gyms.mindbody_500m_revenue_3b_valuat: Mindbody: ~$500M revenue, ~$3B valuation, IPO planned. Still no AI coaching or retention prediction.
for_gyms.a_tailored_walkthrough_of_the_p: A tailored walkthrough of the platform with real data from a gym your size. No slides, no sales pitch, no commitment.
for_members.page_title: For Members — Pulser.One · Your AI coach, any gym, one app
for_members.meta_desc: An AI coach in your pocket. Personalised plans, real-time form feedback, and preventive health — built into your gym's branded app.
for_members.your_ai_coachany_gym_one_app:
Your AI coach.
Any gym. One app.
for_members.the_coach_you_wish_you_could: The coach you wish you could afford. In your pocket.
for_members.three_steps_works_with_or_wi: Three steps. Works with or without your gym.
for_members.pulser_sees_your_movement_th: Pulser sees your movement. Then helps you own it.
for_members.travelling_for_work_weekend_: Travelling for work? Weekend in a new city? Moved last month? Your Pulser.One membership checks you in at any gym on the network within your tier grade — with your plan, your history and your coach right there with you.
for_members.one_slow_rotation_with_your_: One slow rotation with your phone camera. Proportions, posture, composition estimate — without a gym visit.
for_members.point_your_phone_at_yourself: Point your phone at yourself. Frame-by-frame feedback on squats, deadlifts, presses — powered by our movement engine.
for_members.heart_rate_hrv_sleep_steps_f: Heart rate, HRV, sleep, steps from Apple Health, Garmin, Whoop, Oura, Android Health Connect — fed into your plan.
for_members.overtraining_elevated_injury: Overtraining, elevated injury risk, recovery debt — flagged before they become problems.
for_members.walk_into_any_partner_gym_in: Walk into any partner gym in the network within your tier grade — no day pass, no extra app. Your plan follows you.
for_members.book_a_human_coach_from_the_: Book a human coach from the Pulser.Coach network. They see your form data. Your sessions get sharper.
for_members.free_forever_works_on_its_ow: Free forever. Works on its own, or as the member app of any gym on the Pulser network.
for_members.body_scan_goals_wearable_syn: Body scan, goals, wearable sync, any medical flags. The AI Coach builds your first plan in minutes.
for_members.home_homegym_travelgym_coach: Home, home-gym, travel-gym, coach's gym. Cross-gym access is built in. Your plan adapts to every session.
for_members.tell_us_where_you_train_well: Tell us where you train — we'll reach out to your gym. If your gym's not on Pulser yet, you can still use Pulser.One for free.
for_members.your_coach_if_you_want_one: Your coach, if you want one
home.page_title: Pulser.fit — The DeepTech OS for modern fitness
home.meta_desc: Gyms, members and coaches on one platform. Powered by our proprietary movement interpretation engine. Pulser.Gym, Pulser.One and Pulser.Coach — in sync.
home.the_deeptech_operating_system_for_m: The DeepTech operating system for modern fitness.
home.whoever_you_show_up_as_pulser_syncs: Whoever you show up as, Pulser syncs you in.
home.a_proprietary_movement_interpretati: A proprietary movement interpretation layer, built in.
home.one_app_any_gym_on_the_network: One app. Any gym on the network.
home.get_the_whole_ecosystem_in_sync: Get the whole ecosystem in sync.
home.a_free_ai_coach_in_your_pocket_body: A free AI coach in your pocket. Body scan, form feedback, personalised plans — and cross-gym access across the network.
home.stop_stitching_six_tools_clients_pr: Stop stitching six tools. Clients, programming, billing and live movement data in one cockpit.
home.pulser_is_a_deeptech_company_everyt: Pulser is a DeepTech company. Everything on the platform is powered by our own movement interpretation engine — body scan, live form feedback, injury-risk scoring, fatigue detection and personalised periodisation. Not an OpenAI call. Not a wrapper on someone else's model. Our IP, our data, our edge.
home.the_deeper_every_gym_member_and_coa: The deeper every gym, member and coach uses the platform, the better the model gets. That is the flywheel generic fitness SaaS cannot build.
home.your_pulserone_membership_checks_yo: Your Pulser.One membership checks you in at any partner gym of the same grade — home, travel or a spontaneous Saturday in a new city.
home.earn_reciprocal_traffic_and_revenue: Earn reciprocal traffic and revenue share on every visit from a Pulser.One member, with automated settlement and zero front-desk overhead.
home.your_clients_keep_training_and_you_: Your clients keep training — and you keep seeing their real session data — even when they're not in your home gym.
home.crossgym_access_is_built_into_the_p: Cross-gym access is built into the Pulser.Gym and Pulser.One product from day one — not a third-party network bolted on top.
home.whether_you_run_a_gym_train_clients: Whether you run a gym, train clients or just want to train smarter yourself — Pulser plugs you into one platform, one engine, one network.
home.proprietary_movement_interpretation: Proprietary movement interpretation layer — our core stack, not licensed.
home.runs_ondevice_where_it_can_fast_pri: Runs on-device where it can — fast, private, no cloud dependency.
home.designed_for_the_2026_european_heal: Designed for the 2026 European Health Data Space regulation.
home.injuryrisk_models_built_on_publishe: Injury-risk models built on published research — not vibes.
home.eu_fitness_software_ai_coaching_tam: EU fitness software + AI coaching TAM
home.of_gymgoers_open_to_aipowered_coach: Of gym-goers open to AI-powered coaching
home.european_health_data_space_goes_liv: European Health Data Space goes live
home.gen_z_picks_a_gym_based_on_the_memb: Gen Z picks a gym based on the member app
investors.meta_desc: An informational briefing on Pulser — the DeepTech operating system for modern fitness. Market, moat, traction and roadmap, in one place.
investors.a_deeptech_operating_system_fo: A DeepTech operating system for a €8.4B gym software market.
investors.from_poc_to_commercial_pilots_: From PoC to commercial pilots in 12 months.
investors.we_are_not_running_a_public_fu: We are not running a public fundraising process on this site. If you're an investor who'd like a conversation, you can reach the founder directly at go@pulser.fit.
investors.eu_fitness_operators_digital_s: EU fitness operators digital solutions (~15% of TAM)
investors.pose_estimation_biomechanical_: Pose estimation, biomechanical modelling, injury-risk scoring and periodisation run on our own stack — not a wrapper on a third-party API. The movement interpretation layer is the product; everything else is distribution.
investors.mindbody_and_glofox_were_built: Mindbody and Glofox were built as scheduling tools. Adding DeepTech-grade movement AI requires a unified data layer they don't have. Rebuilding takes years and alienates existing customers.
investors.camera_wearables_usershared_he: Camera + wearables + user-shared health records feed a richer model with every session across Pulser.Gym, Pulser.One and Pulser.Coach. More data → better predictions → higher retention.
investors.validation_studies_in_biomecha: Validation studies in biomechanics journals unlock Horizon Europe and EHDS grants — non-dilutive funding competitors can't access.
investors.eu_health_data_regulation_2025: EU health data regulation (2025/327) goes live from 2026. Retrofitting compliance into legacy systems is a multi-year, multi-million cost. We're built EHDS-ready from day one.
investors.every_pulserone_member_can_tra: Every Pulser.One member can train at any partner gym in the same tier. Reciprocal traffic + automated settlement make the network more valuable with every gym that joins.
investors.warsaw_gym_owners_consistent_p: Warsaw gym owners. Consistent pain: fragmented tools, zero engagement data, rising churn.
investors.first_letters_of_intent_from_b: First letters of intent from boutique studios for pilot program. Target: 5 signed LOIs by Q2 2026.
investors.eic_accelerator_poland_prize_s: EIC Accelerator + Poland Prize submitted. Founder previously won LLB 02-242 EU grant.
investors.architecture_amp_prototype_des: Architecture & prototype design ready. MediaPipe-based real-time form analysis on smartphone.
investors.stage_trl_2_ai_architecture_an: Stage: TRL 2 — AI architecture and prototype concept defined. Target: TRL 4–5 (lab / gym-validated prototype) within 12 months.
investors.this_page_is_a_public_overview: This page is a public overview. Deeper materials — technical architecture, financial model, cap table, LOIs and grant applications — are shared one-to-one under NDA with investors we're in active conversation with.
investors.61_of_gym_members_already_use_: • 61% of gym members already use AI-driven fitness tools (ABC Fitness 2025)
investors.eu_ehds_regulation_creates_com: • EU EHDS regulation creates compliance moat starting 2026
investors.47_of_new_gym_joins_are_gen_z_: • 47% of new gym joins are Gen Z — digital-native, AI-expectant
platform.meta_desc: The Pulser platform: Pulser.Gym, Pulser.One and Pulser.Coach, all powered by our proprietary DeepTech movement interpretation engine.
platform.why_one_platform_beats_a_stack: Why one platform beats a stack
platform.see_your_side_of_the_platform: See your side of the platform.
platform.member_crm_scheduling_billing_b: Member CRM, scheduling, billing, branded app, e-commerce and the AI that keeps members subscribed.
platform.body_scan_live_form_feedback_pe: Body scan, live form feedback, personalised plans, injury-risk score and cross-gym access — with AI Coach built in.
platform.client_roster_programming_studi: Client roster, programming studio, live session data, billing and a gym-network marketplace — one cockpit.
platform.pulser_is_a_deeptech_company_ou: Pulser is a DeepTech company. Our movement interpretation engine is IP we own — built from peer-reviewed biomechanics research and trained on real session data from the platform. It runs on-device where possible, in the cloud where it needs to scale.
platform.every_tap_on_the_platform_feeds: Every tap on the platform feeds back into the engine. The member gets better cues. The coach gets a clearer picture. The gym gets lower churn. The moat compounds.
platform.body_scan_posture_composition_l: Body scan, posture, composition, live form. One phone camera, one proprietary model.
platform.rep_counting_tempo_rom_bar_path: Rep counting, tempo, ROM, bar path, risk modelling — based on published research.
platform.hrv_sleep_activity_apple_health: HRV, sleep, activity — Apple Health, Garmin, Whoop, Oura, Android Health Connect.
platform.built_into_pulserone_plans_aler: Built into Pulser.One. Plans, alerts and nudges generated from your own data, not your feed.
platform.gym_member_and_coach_all_read_f: Gym, member and coach all read from the same source. No CSV exports. No Zapier glue.
platform.every_gym_member_and_coach_on_p: Every gym, member and coach on Pulser makes every other part more valuable. Cross-gym access is built in.
platform.proprietary_movement_engine_is_: Proprietary movement engine is our core IP — not a model from a third party that every competitor can also call.
platform.designed_for_the_european_healt: Designed for the European Health Data Space from day one — portable, consented, compliant.
pricing.page_title: Pricing — Pulser · Pulser.Gym, Pulser.One and Pulser.Coach tiers
pricing.meta_desc: Three products, clear tiers. Pulser.One is free for members. Pulser.Gym starts free and unlocks the AI coach on Pro. Pulser.Coach priced per coach.
pricing.free_for_members_fair_for_gyms_a: Free for members. Fair for gyms and coaches.
pricing.the_ai_coach_in_your_pocket: The AI coach, in your pocket.
pricing.run_your_gym_on_one_platform: Run your gym on one platform.
pricing.one_cockpit_instead_of_six_tabs: One cockpit instead of six tabs.
pricing.is_pulserone_really_free_for_mem: Is Pulser.One really free for members forever?
pricing.how_does_the_base_perunit_pricin: How does the base + per-unit pricing work?
pricing.can_i_import_my_existing_member_: Can I import my existing member data?
pricing.do_members_or_coaches_need_speci: Do members or coaches need special hardware?
pricing.how_does_the_crossgym_network_wo: How does the cross-gym network work commercially?
pricing.how_does_ehds_compliance_affect_: How does EHDS compliance affect me as a gym?
pricing.everything_a_member_needs_to_sta: Everything a member needs to start training better. Free for every Pulser member, full stop.
pricing.for_members_who_want_deeper_insi: For members who want deeper insight and cross-gym access. Optional — the base app stays free.
pricing.replace_your_scheduling_tool_tod: Replace your scheduling tool today. Solo trainers and new studios.
pricing.full_management_platform_ai_coac: Full management platform, AI Coach signals and a fully branded member app. For studios, clubs and chains of any type.
pricing.multilocation_chains_franchises_: Multi-location chains, franchises and premium clubs. The base fee covers the platform and your first location; each additional gym is €149/mo. Custom SLA, full API, co-branded portal.
pricing.for_independent_coaches_running_: For independent coaches running their own book of clients.
pricing.full_deeptech_cockpit_with_live_: Full DeepTech cockpit with live form feedback, biomechanics insights and AI co-pilot.
pricing.for_coaching_collectives_pt_team: For coaching collectives, PT teams inside gyms and franchises. The base includes the team cockpit and your first 3 coach seats; each additional coach is €49/mo.
pricing.yes_the_base_tier_is_free_foreve: Yes. The base tier is free forever. Only Premium (€9.99/mo) adds cross-gym access, deep biomechanics reports and preventive health alerts — the core AI coach is free.
pricing.enterprise_gyms_pay_299mo_for_th: Enterprise gyms pay €299/mo for the platform (first location included) plus €149/mo per additional gym. Coach teams pay €149/mo (first 3 seats included) plus €49/mo per additional coach. You only pay for what you actually run.
pricing.yes_we_support_csv_import_and_bu: Yes. We support CSV import and build custom migration scripts for Mindbody, Glofox and Virtuagym during onboarding.
pricing.no_form_analysis_runs_on_any_mod: No. Form analysis runs on any modern smartphone camera. Wearable integration is optional but recommended.
pricing.each_pulserone_plus_visit_to_a_p: Each Pulser.One Plus visit to a partner gym triggers automated settlement between gyms based on tier grade. No front-desk friction, no manual reconciliation.
pricing.ehds_becomes_mandatory_for_eu_he: EHDS becomes mandatory for EU health-data-handling platforms from 2026. Running on Pulser means you're compliant by default.
pricing.gym_pro_has_a_onetime_onboarding: Gym Pro has a one-time onboarding fee covered by your first month's savings. Enterprise includes bespoke onboarding in contract.
pricing.book_a_20minute_call_well_map_yo: Book a 20-minute call. We'll map your workflow to the right combination of Pulser.Gym, Pulser.One and Pulser.Coach.
pricing.360_body_scan_amp_injury_risk_sc: ✓ 360° body scan & injury risk score
pricing.wearable_sync_apple_watch_garmin: ✓ Wearable sync (Apple Watch, Garmin, Whoop, Oura)
pricing.crossgym_access_any_partner_gym_: ✓ Cross-gym access (any partner gym, same tier)
pricing.preventive_health_alerts_hrv_loa: ✓ Preventive health alerts (HRV / load / sleep)
pricing.ai_coach_signals_in_operator_das: ✓ AI Coach signals in operator dashboard
pricing.full_whitelabel_site_app_amp_the: ✓ Full white-label site, app & theming
pricing.live_form_feedback_per_client: ✓ Live form feedback per client
pricing.access_any_partner_gym_in_the_ne: ✓ Access any partner gym in the network
pricing.consolidated_invoicing_volume_di: ✓ Consolidated invoicing + volume discount >10 seats
pulser_coach.meta_desc: Pulser.Coach is the third pillar of the Pulser platform: a full operating system for personal trainers, powered by our proprietary DeepTech movement engine.
pulser_coach.every_client_every_plan_zer: Every client. Every plan. Zero chaos.
pulser_coach.nobody_else_has_the_movemen: Nobody else has the movement data.
pulser_coach.join_the_first_cohort_of_pu: Join the first cohort of Pulser.Coach.
pulser_coach.built_on_our_own_movement_e: Built on our own movement engine
pulser_coach.every_client_profile_with_t: Every client profile with training history, goals, limitations and live plan status.
pulser_coach.draganddrop_plan_builder_wi: Drag-and-drop plan builder with templates, periodisation and an exercise library — synced to Pulser.One.
pulser_coach.the_deeptech_movement_engin: The DeepTech movement engine inside Pulser.One scores form in real time — you see it in your cockpit.
pulser_coach.scheduled_nudges_video_repl: Scheduled nudges, video replies, async voice notes. AI prioritises who needs you most this week.
pulser_coach.sessions_packs_subscription: Sessions, packs, subscriptions, cancellations, EU-ready payments. Invoices go out automatically.
pulser_coach.host_sessions_at_any_gym_on: Host sessions at any gym on the Pulser network. Get discovered by members browsing for a coach.
pulser_coach.the_same_proprietary_moveme: The same proprietary movement interpretation layer your clients use in Pulser.One streams into your cockpit — form score, tempo, ROM, fatigue markers. That's a DeepTech moat no generic coach-app can copy.
pulser_coach.other_coach_tools_are_isola: Other coach tools are isolated. Pulser.Coach is part of a platform with gyms and members already on it — so the people you need to reach are already here.
pulser_coach.designed_to_meet_the_2026_e: Designed to meet the 2026 European Health Data Space rules from day one. Your clients' data stays portable, consented and compliant.
pulser_coach.replaces_scheduling_payment: Replaces scheduling, payments, programming, video coaching, client CRM and analytics. Starts at coach-friendly pricing, not SaaS-bundle pricing.
pulser_coach.pulsercoach_is_in_guided_ea: Pulser.Coach is in guided early access. Apply for the first cohort — priority onboarding, discounted pricing, direct line to the product team.
pulser_gym.meta_desc: Pulser.Gym replaces Mindbody, Glofox, your member app and your e-commerce platform with one unified gym OS — powered by a proprietary DeepTech movement engine.
pulser_gym.run_your_gym_on_one_platform: Run your gym on one platform.
pulser_gym.one_workflow_one_invoice_one_: One workflow. One invoice. One source of truth.
pulser_gym.your_website_your_store_your_: Your website, your store, your app — all generated from one admin.
pulser_gym.start_free_unlock_the_ai_coac: Start free. Unlock the AI coach when you're ready.
pulser_gym.a_proprietary_movement_engine: A proprietary movement engine, inside your gym OS.
pulser_gym.one_membership_any_gym_in_the: One membership. Any gym in the network.
pulser_gym.profile_attendance_payments_e: Profile, attendance, payments, engagement, communication timeline — per member, in one place.
pulser_gym.classes_pt_coach_rosters_wait: Classes, PT, coach rosters, waitlists, capacity, reminders — drag-and-drop calendar, mobile-first.
pulser_gym.subscriptions_dropins_package: Subscriptions, drop-ins, packages, dunning, EU SEPA + cards. No third-party gateway lock-in.
pulser_gym.your_logo_your_colours_your_v: Your logo, your colours, your voice. iOS and Android, App Store and Play Store.
pulser_gym.ship_a_fully_branded_public_w: Ship a fully branded public website in minutes — pick a template, plug in your content, go live on your own domain.
pulser_gym.sell_memberships_dropins_supp: Sell memberships, drop-ins, supplements, merch, digital products — one checkout, member pricing, in-app purchase.
pulser_gym.members_in_the_pulserone_app_: Members in the Pulser.One app can train at any partner gym of the same grade while travelling — revenue-share and reciprocal access, built in.
pulser_gym.pulsergym_ships_with_the_same: Pulser.Gym ships with the same proprietary movement interpretation layer that powers the Pulser.One member app — real-time body scan, form feedback, injury-risk scoring and personalised programming. Not a wrapper on someone else's model. Our own IP.
pulser_gym.any_pulserone_member_can_chec: Any Pulser.One member can check in at any partner gym within their tier grade — business trips, weekends away, moving cities. You get reciprocal traffic, automated settlement and zero front-desk friction.
pulser_gym.pulsergym_ships_with_a_whitel: Pulser.Gym ships with a white-label site builder. Pick a template, upload your logo, set your colours and domain — and Pulser publishes a branded public website and e-commerce store wired straight into your scheduling, memberships, payments and member app. No web agency. No Stripe-and-Shopify glue. No separate CMS to maintain.
pulser_gym.curated_templates_for_boutiqu: Curated templates for boutique gyms, chains, yoga, combat sports, CrossFit, climbing walls, padel clubs, sports centres. Production-ready, SEO-clean, multilingual.
pulser_gym.class_schedules_membership_si: Class schedules, membership sign-up, drop-in booking, coach profiles, trial offers, contact forms, Apple/Google Pay, VAT, invoices, GDPR/EHDS. All live on day one.
pulser_gym.custom_domain_ssl_your_logo_y: Custom domain, SSL, your logo, your colours, your copy. The member never sees the word "Pulser" unless you want them to.
pulser_gym.the_website_the_store_the_mem: The website, the store, the member app and the back office are one system, not four. A lead who lands on your home page becomes a paying member without ever leaving your brand, and the data lands cleanly in one CRM from the first click to the first check-in.
pulser_gym.launch_a_new_location_seasona: Launch a new location, seasonal promo or niche offering in a day, not a quarter.
pulser_gym.pulsergyms_starter_tier_is_fr: Pulser.Gym's Starter tier is free — replace your scheduling tool today. Upgrade to Pro for the AI coach, branded app and cross-gym network.
pulser_gym.scheduling_amp_bookings_synce: • Scheduling & bookings synced live with Pulser.Gym
pulser_gym.member_app_signup_and_deeplin: • Member app sign-up and deep-links (iOS + Android)
pulser_gym.emailsms_via_your_pulser_inbo: • Email/SMS via your Pulser inbox + automated flows
pulser_gym.analytics_ga4_meta_pixel_cons: • Analytics, GA4, Meta Pixel, consent management
pulser_gym.wearables_amp_health_connect_: • Wearables & Health Connect hand-off to Pulser.One
pulser_gym.4_members_at_high_churn_risk_: 4 members at high churn risk this week — scripted outreach ready to send
pulser_one.meta_desc: Pulser.One is the member app of the Pulser platform — training, AI form feedback, cross-gym access and your built-in AI Coach, powered by our proprietary DeepTech movement engine.
pulser_one.your_gym_your_coach_your_body: Your gym. Your coach. Your body. One app.
pulser_one.everything_your_coach_would_c: Everything your coach would charge for — built in.
pulser_one.wherever_you_train_pulserone_: Wherever you train, Pulser.One trains with you.
pulser_one.not_a_wrapper_a_movement_engi: Not a wrapper. A movement engine.
pulser_one.travelling_moving_just_curiou: Travelling? Moving? Just curious? Every Pulser.One member can check in at any gym on the Pulser network within their tier grade — no extra apps, no surprise day-passes. Your plan, your coach and your history come with you.
pulser_one.built_from_scratch_with_ai_in: Built from scratch with AI in the core, not bolted on as a marketing tagline.
pulser_one.mediapipe_tracks_33_body_keyp: MediaPipe tracks 33 body keypoints at 30fps — no cloud, no lag. Real joint angles, bilateral symmetry, form score per rep.
pulser_one.rotate_once_get_body_shape_fr: Rotate once. Get body shape, frame size, composition estimate, posture flags, and a training plan built for your actual proportions.
pulser_one.ai_analyses_joint_biomechanic: AI analyses joint biomechanics, movement asymmetry and Health Connect data (HRV, sleep, resting HR) to predict injury risk before it happens — a 0–100 score with zone breakdown and personalised prevention cues.
pulser_one.reads_fitbit_samsung_health_g: Reads Fitbit, Samsung Health, Garmin, Pixel Watch — all through one API. 500+ connected devices feed the injury-risk model automatically.
pulser_one.your_workout_plan_updates_bas: Your workout plan updates based on your body scan, movement history and Health Connect data. No questionnaire guessing.
pulser_one.perexercise_form_trend_joint_: Per-exercise form trend, joint accuracy history, personal bests. See clearly that you're actually getting better.
pulser_one.barbells_cables_machines_and_: Barbells, cables, machines and cardio. Progressive overload tracked per exercise. Camera AI works from your propped phone at any angle.
pulser_one.bodyweight_mastery_from_begin: Bodyweight mastery — from beginner progressions to advanced skills. AI tracks joint alignment, tension and tempo on every rep.
pulser_one.ai_tracks_depth_alignment_and: AI tracks depth, alignment and balance in real time. Pose-by-pose feedback, hold timers and a daily mobility programme built around your injury risk score.
pulser_one.bodyweight_resistance_bands_d: Bodyweight, resistance bands, dumbbells or zero equipment. Full programs built around exactly what you own — not what you wish you had.
pulser_one.park_bars_stairs_sprints_and_: Park bars, stairs, sprints and outdoor circuits. GPS and cardio data from Health Connect enriches every session.
pulser_one.fightcamp_conditioning_sports: Fight-camp conditioning, sport-specific strength and power work. Injury-risk engine tuned for high-impact loads.
pulser_one.running_cycling_swimming_and_: Running, cycling, swimming and rowing — tracked via Health Connect. HRV + load monitoring feeds into your injury risk score automatically.
pulser_one.returnfrominjury_progressions: Return-from-injury progressions, physio-grade mobility protocols and load management. Injury-risk score drives every decision automatically.
pulser_one.the_free_tier_is_genuinely_us: The free tier is genuinely useful — not a crippled trial.
pulser_one.everything_you_need_to_get_st: Everything you need to get started. No trial period.
pulser_one.billed_monthly_cancel_anytime: Billed monthly. Cancel anytime in 2 taps.
pulser_one.prices_shown_in_local_currenc: Prices shown in local currency where available. VAT may apply.
pulser_one.ai_nutrition_plans_synced_to_: ✓ AI nutrition plans synced to workouts
